name: Apprentice Finn
title: Warrior Apprentice
flavor: An inexperienced fighter. Perfect for practice.

name: Gardener Mira
title: Guardian of the Forest
flavor: She lets her plants fight for her.

name: Whisperer Syl
title: Elven Enchantress
flavor: Her magical words paralyze any attacker.

name: Deep Sea Fisher Rok
title: Lord of the Deep Sea
flavor: The deep sea holds unimagined dangers.

name: Shadow Dealer Vex
title: Dealer of Darkness
flavor: He trades in souls and secrets.

name: Wind Weaver Ara
title: Ruler of the Skies
flavor: The wind carries her messages to the ends of the world.

name: Archmage Theron
title: Master of the Arcane
flavor: Decades of study have made him invincible.

name: Dragon Lord Varek
title: Lord of Dragons
flavor: The strongest duelist in the realm. Do you dare?
